description: Comprehensive PDF manipulation service providing HTML-to-PDF conversion, format export, OCR text extraction, document merging, and password protection capabilities.

tools.name: create_pdf_from_html
tools.description: Generate a PDF document from HTML content with configurable page dimensions.

html_content.description: The HTML content string to be rendered and converted into a PDF document.

output_filename.description: Optional custom filename for the generated output document. If omitted, a system-generated name is assigned.

page_size.description: The page size specification for the output PDF. Supported values: A4, Letter, Legal.

pdf_url.description: The presigned URL for downloading the generated PDF document.

page_count.description: The total number of pages in the generated PDF document.

file_size.description: The size of the generated PDF file in bytes.

tools.name: export_pdf_to_format
tools.description: Export a PDF document to alternative formats including Microsoft Office formats (Word, Excel, PowerPoint) or image files (JPEG, PNG).

pdf_url.description: The URL of the source PDF document to be converted to another format.

target_format.description: The target export format. Supported formats: docx (Word), xlsx (Excel), pptx (PowerPoint), jpeg, png.

output_filename.description: Optional custom filename for the generated output document. If omitted, a system-generated name is assigned.

export_url.description: The presigned URL for downloading the exported file in the target format.

format.description: The format of the exported file, matching the requested target_format.

page_count.description: The total number of pages in the exported document.

tools.name: ocr_pdf
tools.description: Perform optical character recognition on a PDF to extract text or create a searchable PDF document.

pdf_url.description: The URL of the source PDF document to be processed with OCR.

language.description: The language code of the document content for optimized OCR accuracy. Defaults to en-US (English, United States).

output_type.description: The desired OCR output type. 'searchable_pdf' creates a PDF with embedded text layer; 'text_extraction' extracts raw text content.

output_url.description: The presigned URL for downloading the processed file (searchable PDF or text file depending on output_type).

extracted_text.description: The raw extracted text content from the PDF. Only present when output_type is set to 'text_extraction'.

confidence_score.description: The OCR accuracy confidence score ranging from 0 to 100, indicating the reliability of text recognition.

tools.name: combine_pdfs
tools.description: Merge multiple PDF documents into a single consolidated PDF file.

pdf_urls.description: An ordered list of URLs pointing to the PDF documents to be merged. Documents are combined in the order provided.

output_filename.description: Optional custom filename for the generated output document. If omitted, a system-generated name is assigned.

combined_pdf_url.description: The presigned URL for downloading the merged PDF document.

total_pages.description: The total number of pages across all combined source documents.

source_count.description: The number of source PDF documents that were merged.

tools.name: protect_pdf
tools.description: Apply password protection and configurable permission restrictions to secure a PDF document.

pdf_url.description: The URL of the source PDF document to be password protected.

password.description: The password string used to encrypt and restrict access to the PDF document.

printing.description: Allow or deny printing of the PDF document.

copying.description: Allow or deny copying text and content from the PDF document.

editing.description: Allow or deny editing and modification of the PDF content.

commenting.description: Allow or deny adding annotations and comments to the PDF document.

permissions.description: Optional permission settings defining user restrictions for the protected PDF. If omitted, default restrictive permissions apply.

protected_pdf_url.description: The presigned URL for downloading the password-protected PDF document.

encryption_level.description: The encryption standard applied to the PDF (e.g., AES-256).

printing.description: Indicates whether printing is permitted on the protected document.

copying.description: Indicates whether copying content is permitted on the protected document.

editing.description: Indicates whether editing content is permitted on the protected document.

commenting.description: Indicates whether adding comments is permitted on the protected document.

permissions_applied.description: The complete set of permission restrictions that have been applied to the protected document.
